name: NODULAR FASCIITIS

demographics.Histo: immature fibroblasts + variable amount of mature birefringent collagen

dominant_finding: homogeneous mass with attenuation similar to fluid
discriminating_features: ill-defined margins with extension along fascial planes
homogeneous mass with attenuation similar to fluid

MR: heterogeneous mass usually slightly hyperintense relative to muscle on T1WI
hyperintense relative to muscle on T2WI
